_description: Claim Registry — one entry per scientific claim. Controls allowed/disallowed wording.

_legacy_metadata._description: Claim Registry — one entry per scientific claim. Controls allowed/disallowed wording.

entries.text: PocketGNNXL V3 achieves AUROC 0.8081 on 13 held-out CryptoSite proteins (8 val + 5 test), with AUPRC 0.3441 (6.2× above trivial baseline 0.0557).
disallowed_wording: validated on all proteins; AUROC without specifying N=13
entries.notes: Primary generalization metric. Fine-tuning structures NOT included.
entries.claim_text: PocketGNNXL V3 achieves AUROC 0.8081 on 13 held-out CryptoSite proteins (8 val + 5 test), with AUPRC 0.3441 (6.2× above trivial baseline 0.0557).

_legacy.text: PocketGNNXL V3 achieves AUROC 0.8081 on 13 held-out CryptoSite proteins (8 val + 5 test), with AUPRC 0.3441 (6.2× above trivial baseline 0.0557).
_legacy.disallowed_wording: validated on all proteins; AUROC without specifying N=13
_legacy.notes: Primary generalization metric. Fine-tuning structures NOT included.

entries.text: PocketGNNXL V3 recovers the AOH1996 binding site on 8GLA with mean pocket score 0.8676 (threshold 0.700 → PASS). Recovers ≥20/24 ground-truth residues in 23/59 PCNA structures.
allowed_wording: recovers AOH1996 binding site; mean score 0.8676
disallowed_wording: discovers novel pocket at AOH1996 site (it is the ground truth, not a novel finding)
entries.notes: Ground truth: 24 residues within 6 Å of ZQZ in 8GLA chains A+B only.
entries.claim_text: PocketGNNXL V3 recovers the AOH1996 binding site on 8GLA with mean pocket score 0.8676 (threshold 0.700 → PASS). Recovers ≥20/24 ground-truth residues in 23/59 PCNA structures.

_legacy.text: PocketGNNXL V3 recovers the AOH1996 binding site on 8GLA with mean pocket score 0.8676 (threshold 0.700 → PASS). Recovers ≥20/24 ground-truth residues in 23/59 PCNA structures.
_legacy.allowed_wording: recovers AOH1996 binding site; mean score 0.8676
_legacy.disallowed_wording: discovers novel pocket at AOH1996 site (it is the ground truth, not a novel finding)
_legacy.notes: Ground truth: 24 residues within 6 Å of ZQZ in 8GLA chains A+B only.

entries.text: ANM analysis shows the holo PCNA pocket (8GLA) has elevated flexibility vs global (fold-change 1.157, delta +0.300 vs apo 0.857); holo internal DCCM 0.2093 vs apo 0.0995.
allowed_wording: elevated ANM flexibility in holo pocket; fold-change delta +0.300
disallowed_wording: MD-validated pocket opening; confirmed dynamic pocket (requires trajectory evidence)
entries.notes: ANM is normal-mode approximation, not MD. Supports but does not prove dynamic pocket.
entries.claim_text: ANM analysis shows the holo PCNA pocket (8GLA) has elevated flexibility vs global (fold-change 1.157, delta +0.300 vs apo 0.857); holo internal DCCM 0.2093 vs apo 0.0995.

entries.text: PocketGNNXL V3 (+ESM2) outperforms PocketGNN V1 by +0.228 AUROC on 7 internal fine-tuning structures (0.9067 vs 0.6782).
disallowed_wording: generalization improvement (these are fine-tuning structures, not held-out)
entries.notes: ⚠️ Table 1 data only. Always label as internal, not generalization.
entries.claim_text: PocketGNNXL V3 (+ESM2) outperforms PocketGNN V1 by +0.228 AUROC on 7 internal fine-tuning structures (0.9067 vs 0.6782).

_legacy.disallowed_wording: generalization improvement (these are fine-tuning structures, not held-out)
_legacy.notes: ⚠️ Table 1 data only. Always label as internal, not generalization.

entries.text: The AOH1996 binding pocket on PCNA is a cryptic site: invisible in apo structure but exhibiting elevated flexibility in the ligand-bound form by ANM.
allowed_wording: candidate cryptic site; suggestive of dynamic accessibility
disallowed_wording: validated cryptic pocket; confirmed pocket opening
entries.notes: Upgrade to moderately_supported requires MD RMSF + volume evidence. Pending E003.
